gist.headline: Peeking behind the pixels
gist.blurb: Added a new metadata endpoint to the media API. Now you can check file sizes and types without downloading the whole thing.
gist.summary: Implemented a new `GET /{hash}/metadata` endpoint in the media API to retrieve file details like size and content type as JSON.
gist.impact: Developers can now efficiently check media file metadata without needing to download the entire file or rely solely on HEAD requests.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as an archivist or librarian, inspecting a small tag or label attached to a media file. The monitor robot holds the file, displaying its stats. Represents extracting metadata (the tag) from the media (the file).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, inspecting a glowing digital file tag attached to a picture frame held by a chunky monitor-head robot. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'METADATA'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
